name: The Royal Sonesta Kaua'i Resort Lihue
description: Indulge at the Full-Service Spa Unwind with massages, body treatments, and facials, then enjoy 5 spa tubs and a 24-hour fitness center for relaxation and rejuvenation. Culinary Delights Taste international cuisine at 4 restaurants or grab a coffee at the cafe. Sip on drinks at poolside bar or the 2 bars/lounges. Don't miss the cooked-to-order breakfasts daily. Luxurious Accommodations Stay in one of the 356 guestrooms with Smart TVs, Egyptian cotton sheets, and private bathrooms. Stay connected with wireless internet and enjoy cable programming for entertainment. Immerse yourself in beachside bliss at The Royal Sonesta Kaua'i Resort Lihue. Book your stay now for a tropical getaway like no ot
importantInfo: Pool access available from 7:00 AM to 10:00 PM. Up to 2 children 17 years old and younger stay free when occupying the parent or guardian's room, using existing bedding. The property has connecting/adjoining rooms, which are subject to availability and can be requested by contacting the property using the number on the booking confirmation. A car is recommended for transportation to and from this property. The property is professionally cleaned.

reviews.name: burnsc2003
reviews.headline: Gorgeous property!
reviews.pros: Beautiful property with great dining options. We loved Portofinos! Staff was very attentive with waitresses walking around poolside to take drink and lunch orders. The cove on which property is situated is picturesque. Pricey but well worth it.

reviews.name: arthuro683
reviews.headline: The Royal Sonesta Hotel Is Lihue’s Best Hotel
reviews.pros: We are 50+ year Marriott Ambassadors. The Royal Sonesta acquired the hotel from Marriott and Marriott still has the adjoining time shares. We are staying in the time shares portion and were concerned that the “Marriott ethic” we are used to might be compromised in the hotel area which controls the…

reviews.name: 436memec
reviews.headline: overpriced for what you get :( if you stay here stick to the basic reviews the upgrades aren’t worth it!
reviews.pros: Not a 4 star hotel but any measure but a decent stay. I would recommend paying a little more for a better stay if you want a luxury experience. Pros: nice pool, several hydrotherapy pools, tons of chairs, decent rooms, beach front access, staff seemed friendly Cons: older rooms (including updated…

reviews.name: ChicagoJanice
reviews.headline: True Hawaiian spirit!
reviews.pros: Great staff!!!! I visited on a day pass prior to a night flight to Denver and onto Chicago. I inadvertently left my phone in the lobby restroom and realized it within 15 minutes. Went back and nothing. Belinda (guest services), a gentleman at check-in and Devin and his colleagues with Security went…

reviews.name: normaw806
reviews.headline: Paradise in Paradise.
reviews.pros: This hotel is gorgeous; the grounds are meticulously maintained. The food and drinks are top notch.There is plenty of shops, restaurants and spas within walking distance (1/4 mile)

reviews.name: Travel4you
reviews.headline: Beautiful day in Kauai at the Royal Sonesta.
reviews.pros: The Royal Sonesta is a beautiful hotel. The grounds are beautifully landscaped The pool is huge. There are plenty of loungers and umbrellas. You can choose beach, poolside or both. The atmosphere is relaxing. We were in Kauai for the day on a cruise ship. We purchased a day pass and it was a…

name: The Kauai Inn
facilities: Staff adhere to local safety protocols
Cleaning standards that are effective against Coronavirus
Hand sanitizer in guest room and key areas
Guests can opt-out any cleaning services during stay
Shared stationery like menus, pens are removed
description: Luxurious Plantation-Style Property Breathtaking Views and Convenient Location Enjoy the stunning vistas of the Hula'eia Mountains from our outdoor pool at Kauai Inn. Nestled next to Niumalu Beach Park and Nawiliwili Bay, perfect for surfing and fishing enthusiasts. Comfortable Rooms and Modern Amenities Indulge in our air-conditioned guest rooms equipped with flat screen TVs, refrigerators, and microwaves. Stay connected with free WiFi and enjoy complimentary coffee and juice under the outdoor pavilion. Relaxing Atmosphere and Exceptional Service Unwind in our landscaped property or by using the barbecue facilities. With free local calls and a warm Aloha spirit, experience the true essence
importantInfo: Guests are required to show a photo identification and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. In response to Coronavirus (COVID-19), additional safety and sanitation measures are in effect at this property. Food & beverage services at this property may be limited or unavailable due to Coronavirus (COVID-19). Due to Coronavirus (COVID-19), this property is taking steps to help protect the safety of guests and staff. Certain services and amenities may be reduced or unavailable as a result. In accordance with government guidelines to minimise transmission of the Coronavirus (COVID-19), this property may request additional documentation from guests to validate identity, travel itinerary and other relevant information, during dates where such guidelines exist.

reviews.name: Departure675137
reviews.headline: We’re likely to return soon!
reviews.pros: Over the top staff and generous, kind, flexible and Informative .

reviews.name: Happiness771381
reviews.headline: a short stay in paradise
reviews.pros: when we arrived at kauai inn it felt as if we had landed in paradise. the grounds are set in the backdrop of hills and everything has a feeling of calm (the aloha feeling). our room was functional with large beds (king size ) and basically had all you need including a microwave and a fridge to heat…

reviews.name: agustor2026
reviews.headline: Perfect vacation hotel
reviews.pros: Excellent service everything was perfect specially Elton he did an amazing job while I was there with my family also Jen and Chris, they also have a lady who cleans the room every single day which is amazing because every night we comeback The rooms was clean and organized I will definitely…

reviews.name: khushbuc2026
reviews.headline: Amazing stay at Kauai Inn
reviews.pros: We loved our stay at Kauai Inn, absolutely recommend it to all! Elton and all the other staff were so friendly, kind and welcoming, they took such good care of our needs especially our toddler. They lend us all beach supplies including pool toys so we didn’t have to carry everything while we were…

reviews.name: jenniferfZ4221MI
reviews.headline: Wonderful Hotel!!!
reviews.pros: The staff and atmosphere were unbelievably pleasant. I was so pleased with the unique and authentic Hawaiian experience. This was a very special trip for my girlfriend and I. I proposed in our room at the Kauai Inn with the help of Elton who works the front desk. I couldn't have made it as romantic…

reviews.name: RamonZZZ
reviews.headline: No peaceful nights, a meager breakfast, no place to store your belongings, loud roosters — choose a different hotel
reviews.pros: The air conditioners are so loud that even if yours is turned off at night, the units in the neighboring rooms create an eerily loud background noise. And if that doesn’t bother you, then perhaps the countless free-roaming roosters on Kauai will. They’re a real nuisance and crow nonstop from 3 a.m…

name: Banyan Harbor Resort
description: Experience the perfect blend of comfort and relaxation at Banyan Harbor Resort, your ideal getaway in Lihue. Recreational Delights Dive into relaxation at our outdoor pool or enjoy a friendly match at our outdoor tennis court. With a picnic area and barbecue grills, your fun-filled days are complemented by memorable evenings under the stars. Home Away From Home Unwind in one of our 63 individually decorated guestrooms, complete with fully-equipped kitchens, private lanais, and modern entertainment amenities including cable programming and DVD players, ensuring you feel right at home. Business & Concierge Services Our 24-hour business center and dedicated multilingual staff are here to ca

reviews.name: Vanessa
reviews.headline: Good location, noisy.
reviews.pros: Great location, easy parking. Good kitchen and laundry facilities in room.
reviews.cons: Noisy from the air con and room above

reviews.name: Darrian
reviews.headline: Very enjoyable!
reviews.pros: Location, and the room was beautiful
reviews.cons: Blankets were too thin.

reviews.name: Candace
reviews.pros: My friend and I each had our own bedroom and bathroom. Big living room, fully equipped kitchen, a/c in every room. Clean. We are seniors and found having to go up steps to get to the first floor a bit challenging with our suitcases. There is no elevator.
reviews.cons: Everything was just fine. Parking was not a problem.

reviews.name: Jeffery
reviews.headline: Dirty and apathetic
reviews.pros: The distance from the airport and the view
reviews.cons: Clumps of hair on towels; shower soap dish covered in scum; roaches; bedroom window wouldn’t close so owners took the batteries out of the bedroom remote

reviews.name: Kristina
reviews.headline: Reccomend
reviews.pros: Really nice please in Kauai- you get to everything pretty fast. Is really clean & friendly people at the reception
reviews.cons: We had the C building - which is near to the Main Street, during the night is was pretty loud. Just be aware if you book it. I would still reccomend it, because the location is really nice & everything is clean

reviews.name: Sweetie
reviews.pros: Great view
reviews.cons: Really dusty blinds. Toilet water shot out of Toilet when flushed.

name: 2417 at Lihue Oceanfront Resort

description: Indulge in a tropical paradise at 2417 at Lihue Oceanfront Resort, where luxury meets relaxation. Spa and Pools : Rejuvenate your senses at our serene spa, followed by a refreshing dip in one of our 4 outdoor swimming pools or unwind in one of 2 soothing hot tubs, all while enjoying panoramic ocean views. Dining Delights : Savor global flavors with a choice of 4 exquisite restaurants, alongside a quaint coffee shop/café. After dinner, relax at the bar/lounge or sip cocktails poolside as the sun sets. Sleep - Select Comfort bed, Egyptian cotton linens, and a down duvet

reviews.name: Rylan Ellery
reviews.headline: Great stay and location but is currently undergoing renovations so the main front is unavailable
reviews.pros: Great location and close to the airport.
reviews.cons: Construction was happening during our stay, front desk was relocated to a different area. Lots of area were blocked off or closed. Felt like a maze just to get to the restaurant or pool/beach.

reviews.name: Jim
reviews.headline: Would definitely go back.
reviews.pros: On the ocean. Even a partial ocean view is dramatic. We were on the pool side level one so easy access to the pool and hot tub.
reviews.cons: I didn’t know it was under renovation. However the restaurant was very close to our room and we ate there six times. The renovation created an obstacle course from front desk to room since the lobby was inaccessible. Every guest I ran into was having fun with the confusion.

reviews.name: Alexander
reviews.headline: Just so restful and quiet. Beautiful surroundings too.
reviews.pros: The staff was helpful and took care of room issues quickly.
reviews.cons: They are going through temporary construction but it was still great. Next time the gym could be available.

reviews.name: Oliver
reviews.pros: The Pool and Restaurant was good.
reviews.cons: The Lobby was under construction but we where not told.

reviews.name: Estefania
reviews.headline: we loved our stay !
reviews.pros: Private beach is great Pool area is clean and well maintained The restaurant was clean and staff was friendly Food was great Rooms are clean and spacious.
reviews.cons: suggestions: - add a credit card to all vending machines - no one uses cash anymore - add a laundry/dryer facility in the hotel - add a microwave to the rooms...using a communal microwave is terrible.

reviews.name: Terri
reviews.pros: Beautiful beach for sunrise.
reviews.cons: I wasn't informed of all the construction before booking. Many areas were not available. Door on one of the rooms did not open completely. Couldn't find the workout room. Safe didn't work.

name: Castle Kaha Lani Resort
description: Escape to the sun-kissed paradise of Castle Kaha Lani Resort, where comfort meets adventure on the idyllic shores of Lihue. Recreational Delights : Dive into our sparkling outdoor pool or challenge a friend to a match on our full-sized outdoor tennis court. Whether you seek relaxation or activity, our amenities cater to all tastes. Convenient Accommodations : Our 33 spacious guestrooms are designed for your comfort, featuring fully equipped kitchens with refrigerators and microwaves. Enjoy your morning coffee on private lanais while staying connected with complimentary wireless internet. Proximity to Attractions : Nestled just minutes from both Kitchens and Lydgate Beach, our resort places y
importantInfo: Children 17 years old and younger stay free when occupying the parent or guardian's room, using existing bedding.

reviews.name: Travis
reviews.headline: Great Location on a Beautiful Island
reviews.pros: The resort is a is a great location close to Kapa'a. The room has many nice updates, including bathrooms and kitchen and hardwood floors.
reviews.cons: The carpet was a little rough for the wear, and appeared to be left out of the updates.

reviews.name: Lucas
reviews.headline: Great outdoor facilities but very outdated rooms, at the point to look dirty and greasy. Is the typical vacational renta
reviews.pros: Beautiful outdoor facilities and pool.
reviews.cons: The rooms are completely outdated, and they seem dirty, especially the kitchen, with greasy appliances. The patio furtiture was rusty. The general sensation is that no one is investing a single dollar in the rooms since they were purchased.

reviews.name: Pete
reviews.pros: beautiful view from the balcony clean comfortable place.
reviews.cons: need a new mattress is our only complaint.

reviews.name: Marlene
reviews.pros: Nothing between us and the ocean! Easy access to walking path and Lydgate park which had an ocean swimming area. The condo grounds were very well taken care of. The unit was dated, but very clean and comfortable.
reviews.cons: Like most condos, footsteps and running water noises from upstairs unit, but we had great or no neighbors during our stay. Unit is next to pool which was super convenient, but also allowed pool noises while in our unit.

reviews.name: Richard
reviews.headline: Will not return to this property
reviews.pros: Not much
reviews.cons: Front desk staff unwelcoming. Only one pool and no hot tub. Bed was small. Cock roaches even on the second floor. Paid for ocean view and only got a partial. We were put behind another building. Weather in Lihue is rainy and cloudy

reviews.name: Brian
reviews.headline: Perfect balance of convenience and privacy
reviews.pros: Location was perfect. Near the airport, places to eat and other amenities.
reviews.cons: Every morning 2 roosters go from unit to unit and crow.

name: Kauai Palms Hotel
description: Island Style Furnishings and Modern Amenities Kauai Palms Hotel, located near Lihue Airport, offers a unique blend of island style furnishings and modern amenities. Each room features a flat-screen TV, refrigerator, and the option for air conditioning or kitchenettes. Convenient Location for Exploring Situated just one mile from Kauai Lagoons Golf Club and Kalapaki Bay, guests can easily explore nearby attractions. Downtown Lihue, with Harbor Mall and Kaua'i Museum, is minutes away. Outdoor enthusiasts can enjoy snorkeling, fishing, hiking, and surfing in the area. Free WiFi and Scenic Views Guests at Kauai Palms Hotel can enjoy free WiFi and stunning views of the Kipu Mountains. With on-sit
importantInfo: Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. This property does not accommodate bachelor(ette) or similar parties. A deposit may be required at the property.

rooms.summary: This air-conditioned twin room is consisted of of a TV with cable channels and a private bathroom.

rooms.name: Standard Twin Room with Mountain View

reviews.name: Shauna
reviews.headline: Great for a short overnight stay!
reviews.pros: The bed was so comfy! The staff we encountered were so kind! You do get what you pay for here, but it was very clean! Loved having beach towels to use! We only used the room for a few hours before our flight.
reviews.cons: Staff never informed us of early check in when we asked multiple times before arrival and said they would. We were parked half hour early and could see our room, it was ready by then but were told they would let us know. Disappointing. No outlets next to beds. Can be noisy with windows open. Double…

reviews.name: Shydel
reviews.headline: Recommended definitely, if you want a quiet relaxing stay away from all the loudness.
reviews.pros: The quiet location and the staff being really friendly and helpful. The AC and water was STRONG which we loved a lot. A very comfortable and affordable place to relax away from all the stress from our city.
reviews.cons: The room was perfect for just me and my other half but the floors were a little dirty, left our feet dirty after walking around inside but we ended up just wearing our slippers while inside.

reviews.name: Randa
reviews.headline: Kuaui gem
reviews.pros: Loved the charm and character of the hotel.it was locally owned and managed and we had the opportunity to learn about Kuaui history through the stories and artifacts of the manager. That was an unexpexted enhancement of our experience! Hotel was very clean, offered great morning coffee, and had…
reviews.cons: The hotel was a little off the beaten path but easily accessible to several good restaurants.

reviews.name: Kimya
reviews.pros: Staff she was really nice and the chickens in the morning, cute
reviews.cons: Noting honestly!

reviews.name: Mary Therese
reviews.headline: Location for breakfast and sightseeing was great.Also had convenient parking.
reviews.pros: Location
reviews.cons: Very noisy in the early mornings. Also sitting area had very uncomfortable furniture.

reviews.name: Janie
reviews.headline: I would not stay in this hotel, the cockroaches are a deal breaker!!
reviews.pros: I liked how close the hotel is to the the airport and to the best local food restaurants. Staff was friendly and the room was clean. Management tried to fix the issue by giving us options, 10% discount if we stayed in the same room, moving to a different room but no discount or checking out and…
reviews.cons: I did not like that the our original room was upstairs and that there is no elevator for the heavy travel bags. Rooms are very small and outdated. Cockroaches🪳in walls, kitchenette and shower. Full size bed that can barely fit two people. Informed management of cockroaches and was upgraded to a…

name: Marriott's Kaua'i Beach Club
facilities: Guests can opt-out any cleaning services during stay
description: Luxurious Beachfront Accommodations Nestled on Kalapaki Beach, Marriot Kaua’i Beach Club offers modern accommodations with free Wi-Fi and kitchenettes. Enjoy stunning ocean views from select rooms with private balconies. Relaxation and Recreation Unwind by the multiple outdoor pools and hot tubs, or pamper yourself at the Alexander Day Spa with Hawaiian massages and salon services. Stay active at the fitness center or hit the greens at the on-site Hokuala Golf Course. Culinary Delights Indulge in a variety of dining options ranging from Pacific Rim cuisine at Kukui's to fresh seafood at Duke's. Savor contemporary Japanese sushi at Toro Tei or grab a quick bite at Aupaka Terrace for breakfast
importantInfo: The Main Pool deck will undergo renovation throughout 2026. The pool and hot tub will remain open. Select villa lanais are undergoing repairs through August 2026. Access and views may be limited. Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. A deposit may be required at the property.

pros: Valet staff and landscapers were friendly
cons: Poor room quality and maintenance issues

reviews.name: Joseph
reviews.headline: Next time we will stay longer!!
reviews.pros: We had adjoining rooms for wife and myself as well as our son and his family. Rooms were newly renovated and extremely comfortable!
reviews.cons: Nothing! Grounds looked as good as ever and restaurant food was awesome!

reviews.name: Jennifer
reviews.headline: For the price we got jipped. Smallest room ever.
reviews.pros: The pool is beautiful. Our view was amazing. Our balcony was great and overlooked the ocean
reviews.cons: Our room was so small. We had to move the couch to pull down the Murphy bed. And we couldn’t even use the couch the room Was so small. The bed was not comfortable either. And the water in the shower was cold. And was turned off form 11:00 pm till morning. Inconvenient.

reviews.name: David
reviews.headline: GREAT PLACE.. BOOKING hid important notes about the bed
reviews.pros: The beach and restaurants are very close just a short walk out of your room. The grounds and staff are exceptional.
reviews.cons: READ THE ENTIRE ROOM DESCRIPTION!! Booking carefully hid the fact that the queen ocean suite has a FOLDING OUT MURPHY BED

reviews.name: Nora
reviews.headline: I always have fun in Kauai
reviews.pros: Terrace and bar were fine
reviews.cons: Mattress on bed. Not enough shade at the pool

reviews.name: Lori
reviews.headline: I wouldn’t stay again. Not enough positives to get me back.
reviews.pros: The location is nice. The pool is nice and having a nice beach is lovely. We ordered food that we enjoyed as well.
reviews.cons: I didn’t like that your Marriott advantages depending on your level were not honored. I didn’t like the cost for what you get nor the cost of the food. I didn’t see on my booking that the bed was a wall bed. That was a shock and did not care for the room at all.

reviews.name: Darrell Hall
reviews.headline: Wonderful location for great beach walks
reviews.pros: N/A
reviews.cons: Room was so small a Murphy bed folded out of the wall making it difficult to move around in the space…

reviews.pros: The rooms are honestly the best of class for a Marriott resort property. It makes sene that this hotel was built as a Ritz Carlton residence. The views are spectacular and the terrace is great. We had an issue when we checked in and Candee R. was very understanding and immediately resolved the…

reviews.name: JohnTSJC
reviews.headline: Excellent Stay at Kauai Lagoons
reviews.pros: Wow! The best service and wonderful villas. View is out of this world, and everything works like it should. Very clean facilities.

reviews.name: Denis841
reviews.headline: A Beautiful Retreat.
reviews.pros: Simply Spectacular. On a promontory overlooking the mountains surrounding Kalapaki Beach on Kaua’i and the great Pacific beyond, these villas were originally created as residences, but are now available by Marriott for rent. The rooms are in fact big 2 & 3 bedroom villas immaculately furnished with…

reviews.name: brandonsI3412JZ
reviews.headline: Not a 4 star resort - Avoid until they fix the pest issues and property condition
reviews.pros: I really wanted to love this stay, but I’m leaving extremely disappointed. This property is marketed as a 4-star luxury Marriott resort, but it’s currently not living up to that brand. We found cockroaches in multiple spots in our villa—both in the bathroom and in the kitchen right near our food…

reviews.name: kkg17
reviews.headline: Disappointing
reviews.pros: If you are a Marriott Vacation Club owner, you will be very disappointed in this resort. Unlike the other Marriott resorts I’ve been to in Hawaii, this one 1) does not have a beach to walk to and relax on 2) does not have any adult activities like yoga, water aerobics, mixology classes 3) there is…

name: Kaua'i Palms Hotel
facilities: Upper floors accessible by stairs only
description: Discover tranquility at Kaua'i Palms Hotel, where your unforgettable Hawaiian getaway begins in the heart of Lihue. Comfortable Accommodations Unwind in one of our 36 inviting guestrooms, thoughtfully designed to make you feel right at home, complete with complimentary wireless internet access to keep you connected. Relaxing Outdoor Spaces Enjoy the serene views from our lush garden or indulge in a delightful picnic at our designated area, perfect for soaking up the sun and making memories. Convenient Amenities Experience hassle-free travel with amenities such as free self-parking, luggage storage, and a microwave in our common area, ensuring your stay is as comfortable and convenient as pos
importantInfo: Take in the views from a garden and make use of amenities such as complimentary wireless internet access and a picnic area.

reviews.name: Paul D
reviews.pros: I have no problem with the management of this hotel, but I want people to understand what the property is so they’re not taken by surprise as I was. It’s a wood structure built in the 1960’s, according to a sign on the property. It’s two stories with no elevator. I’m in my 70’s and I had to carry a…

reviews.name: James
reviews.pros: Great and efficient!

reviews.name: Sue
reviews.pros: Didn’t use kitchen facilities

reviews.name: Danielle
reviews.pros: This place is so cute! The staff were very friendly. AC runs cold and the bed was comfortable. No issues with water pressure or hot water. There are several food options within walking distance. It is an older building and has its quirks but I wouldn’t hesitate to stay here again.

reviews.name: Larry
reviews.pros: Staff was helpful when asking questions.

reviews.name: Cavin
reviews.pros: The staff was very helpful in making sure I got the key to my room because I arrived after 8pm. The room was very comfortable.

name: Timbers Kauai Ocean Club & Residences
description: Luxurious Accommodation : Timbers Kauai Ocean Club & Residences offers 5-star accommodation with beautifully appointed rooms featuring balconies, air conditioning, and flat-screen TVs. Some rooms even boast private patios for a touch of exclusivity. Top-Notch Amenities : Enjoy a relaxing stay with access to a hot tub, terrace, outdoor swimming pool, and fitness centre. Indulge in delicious meals at the on-site restaurant, take advantage of the free shuttle service, or unwind in the shared lounge area. Convenient Location : Situated just 500 metres from Kalapaki Beach, guests can explore nearby attractions like Lydgate State Park and Wailua Falls. With Lihue Airport a short 3 km away, you
importantInfo: Please note that construction work is going on nearby 09:00 to 17:00 and some rooms may be affected by noise.Guests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply. Please inform of your expected arrival time in advance. You can use the Special Requests box when booking, or contact the property directly using the contact details in your confirmation. A deposit may be required at the property.

policies.name: Parking
policies.description: Free private parking is possible on site (reservation is not needed).

policies.name: Internet
policies.description: WiFi is available in the hotel rooms and is free of charge.

policies.name: Children and extra bed policy
policies.description: Children of any age are allowed. Children up to and including 2 years old stay for US$0 per person per night when using an available cot. Children up to and including 17 years old stay for US$0 per person per night when using an existing bed. You haven't added any extra beds. Any type of extra bed or child's cot/crib is upon request and needs to be confirmed by management. Supplements are not calculated automatically in the total costs and will have to be paid for separately during your stay.

reviews.name: Claire
reviews.headline: Fabulous property, loved our holiday.
reviews.pros: Beautiful spacious apartment, great facilities and not too busy to enjoy them. Pools are lovely, staff professional including the daily cleaners. We had a rental car, essential as this resort is not walking distance to anywhere. We didn't eat at the resort but enjoyed local restaurants, food trucks…
reviews.cons: Additional daily charge took us by surprise as our Booking.com booking specified it included all charges. Worth checking at the beginning of stay so no surprises at the end.

reviews.name: Larry
reviews.pros: Perfection! I couldn’t imagine a better place than here! From the luxurious accommodation, to the stunning infinity pools, the farm to table restaurants and wonderful staff! This place is a cut above most places I stay! I got super lucky to find this perfect spot of paradise!

reviews.name: Leslie Ann
reviews.pros: Wonderful! Highly recommend

reviews.name: Jane
reviews.pros: We were welcomed with such graciousness: beautiful leis and cold ginger lemon drinks and refreshing towels and then escorted personally to our spacious and artistically decorated condo. Our first night at Timbers was magical with palm trees, flowering tropical plants and lighted tiki torches…

reviews.name: Mr. James L.
reviews.pros: Very well maintained and beautiful.

reviews.name: Maria
reviews.pros: Beautiful property on the edge of the ocean with lots of on property activities especially for kids and a short drive to most of the island. The rooms are new, spacious, beautiful and really comfortable.

name: Kauai Beach Villas
description: Relax by the Outdoor Pool Refresh yourself in the outdoor pool or unwind with a cocktail on the poolside loungers. Fully Equipped Guestrooms Feel at home in our guestrooms with kitchens, private lanais, and entertainment options like cable TV and DVD players. Convenient Location Explore nearby attractions such as Nukolii Beach Park and Wailua Golf Course within minutes from our beachfront villa. Indulge in a beachfront getaway at Kauai Beach Villas - Book now for a relaxing stay by the ocean!
importantInfo: Only registered guests are allowed in the guestrooms. Contactless check-in and contactless check-out are available.

reviews.name: Maria
reviews.pros: We did not stay there, because of a mistake booking.com made with description of room and assignment of wrong apt for 5 people, we had to find out own accommodation at double the price.
reviews.cons: Wrong assignment of apartment wrong description on booking website. I asked booking for refund and compensation.

reviews.name: Guest
reviews.headline: Beautiful view, great staff, great location.
reviews.pros: Location of my room was perfect!
reviews.cons: When we arrived system was down and we were unable to check in. We didn’t get our keys until about 10pm

reviews.name: Sophie
reviews.headline: mold in whole appartement
reviews.pros: large rooms, location
reviews.cons: whole apartement was moldy. Not just a little mold in the bathroom, there was even mold on the nightstand lamp next to your sleeping pillow. The whole room had a moldy smell. It's not just nasty, it's a health hazard.

reviews.name: Alexandria
reviews.headline: Good, distant from everything, nice beach.
reviews.pros: The rooms were clean, spacious, and overall very nice.
reviews.cons: They charge you a deposit and refund it days later. There is also a resort fee that they charge you per day once you arrive.

reviews.name: Barry
reviews.headline: Horrible experience
reviews.pros: Convenient
reviews.cons: Extra Holidays/ Wyndham/ Booking.com cancelled my reservations so I had no room. They were not able to find me room and initial promises of room the next day did not happen.

reviews.name: Samantha
reviews.headline: It was ok for the money.
reviews.pros: Friendly staff, good size apartment for 3-4 guests. Location was decent for traveling to different points on the island.
reviews.cons: The living room ac did not work and was not fixed during our stay. The property needs a lot of renovating- the up keep seemed to be subpar. The beach was not good for swimming.

reviews.name: Amanda
reviews.headline: Good time, expense but lots to do.
reviews.pros: Beautiful property, lands were pretty.
reviews.cons: Rooms felt old and overall the hotel had scuffs on walls, elevators, and felt a bit older in the actual hallways and rooms.

reviews.name: Morris
reviews.pros: Pool was Beautiful. Had a really great dinner at tidepools. My kids loved the Parrots and the Koi pond fish feeding. Property was pristine and very well kept.
reviews.cons: Disappointed in Room service. Ordered dinner for 4 at 7:30pm and didn't arrive until 9:30pm. My burger tasted like "heatlamp" and all the fries were hard. Not impressed for $120 dollars. Pillows provided no support, not enough fill.

reviews.name: William
reviews.pros: I loved the architextural design and the layout, which provided many points of interest.
reviews.cons: Airport shuttle. Kauai is so unreliable for transportation without renting a car.

reviews.name: Guest
reviews.pros: Beautiful property and the pool is amazing. Staff was very friendly
reviews.cons: Food and drink is quite expensive on property. Walking to another restaurant is not an option.

reviews.name: Joey
reviews.headline: This hotel is over rated. Room is outdated. The pool is not very clean. Food is overpriced. Coffee is horrible and o
reviews.pros: The property is well decorated and easy to get around
reviews.cons: Old outdated room, mosquitoes, and not very clean around the pool area.

reviews.name: Rajiv
reviews.headline: Had a wonderful time in this beautiful Hotel.
reviews.pros: Great Location, wonderful Rooms, Friendly staff, two of the famous Restaurants of the Island are in the Hotel

name: Koloa Landing Resort at Poipu, Autograph Collection
description: Luxurious Amenities Pamper yourself with onsite massages, facials, and enjoy 3 outdoor swimming pools, 5 spa tubs, and a waterslide. Dining Options Indulge in poolside dining at Holoholo Grill, with a poolside bar and opportunities for alfresco dining. Don't miss out on the room service and poolside bar. Convenience and Comfort Stay connected with complimentary wireless internet access, enjoy Smart televisions, and relax in individually decorated guestrooms with furnished lanais, pillowtop beds, and premium bedding. Experience luxury and convenience at its finest when you book your stay at Koloa Landing Resort at Poipu, Autograph Collection.
importantInfo: Pool access available from 7:30 AM to 10:00 PM. Reservations are required for massage services and spa treatments. Reservations can be made by contacting the hotel prior to arrival, using the contact information on the booking confirmation. Up to 7 children 18 years old and younger stay free when occupying the parent or guardian's room, using existing bedding. The property has connecting/adjoining rooms, which are subject to availability and can be requested by contacting the property using the number on the booking confirmation. Guests can access their rooms with a mobile device. Contactless check-out is available. This property welcomes guests of all sexual orientations and gender identities (LGBTQ+ friendly).

name: Sheraton Kauai Resort Villas
description: Experience paradise at Sheraton Kauai Resort Villas, where comfort meets convenience in the heart of Koloa. Unwind in Luxury Dive into relaxation with not one, but two stunning outdoor swimming pools, perfect for soaking up the island sun. After a dip, stay active in our fully-equipped fitness center. Culinary Delights Savor delectable meals at our on-site restaurant or take advantage of room service for an in-room dining experience. Your taste buds are in for a treat with diverse options available. reviews.name: Shannon Turner
reviews.headline: Loved the room, staff, and location, but beware the exorbitant (and hidden) parking fees!
reviews.pros: The room, staff, and facilities were beautiful! Our kitchenette was fully stocked, and having a washer/dryer in the room is a huge win.
reviews.cons: We just received our folio for our stay, and we were charged multiple different parking fees throughout the day when we were told that valet for the day was $30, whether we came in and out once or more than that, and that self-parking was $40/day. We valeted, and one of our days had almost $100 in…

reviews.name: Rita
reviews.headline: Disappointed and will never return.
reviews.pros: Location was good
reviews.cons: Staff when we arrived did not offer to explain all of the services/activities the hotel offers or what one should do in the area. It was very confusing to get to the parking/room. He did not even mention that I had paid for breakfast to be included until I mentioned it and said "Ah yes....". But…

reviews.name: Katharina
reviews.pros: The staff was friendly, helpful, and professional throughout our stay. Despite our late arrival, we were pleasantly surprised with a room upgrade, which was greatly appreciated. Another thoughtful touch was the refresh room available after check-out, where guests can take a shower and change before…
reviews.cons: At over $600 per night, we were expecting a more professional experience. The room itself was spacious, and the ocean view was truly beautiful. One of the main reasons we chose this hotel was for the activities they advertised. Unfortunately, none of them took place during our stay because the…

reviews.name: Schutz
reviews.headline: Our stay was fantastic at the Sheraton Kauai Resort. Beautiful, clean and fabulous staff!
reviews.pros: The property is beautiful. The landscaping is beautiful. Loved the lei making class, Tammy was great!
reviews.cons: Our studio was in the back, but it was still nice. Parking was a little difficult if you came back to resort later.

reviews.name: Jaime
reviews.headline: Perfect location and resort!
reviews.pros: Honestly-everything! It is on the best beach, our villa was nicely laid out and so great to have a kitchen, staff was incredible with daily bed making and tidying and the pools and amenities were fabulous! Loved morning yoga on the beach every day! I wasn’t really sure what to expect with the…
reviews.cons: Nothing!

reviews.name: Emma
reviews.headline: Not worth the 9 rating
reviews.pros: - Great access to a more or less private beach - Clean
reviews.cons: What isn’t clear about this hotel is that these are partly owned apartments. And the Sheraton hotel is actually over the road. So your booking depends on which apartments are available to rent out. The 1st one we were given had a very pungent funky smell. This was disappointing because we were on…

name: Ko'a Kea Resort on Po'ipu Beach
description: Luxurious Spa and Recreation - Indulge in massages, body treatments, and facials at the full-service spa, relax by the outdoor pool, or work out at the fitness center. Dining and Entertainment - Enjoy delectable meals at the on-site restaurant overlooking the pool, sip on drinks at the poolside bar, or opt for room service. Elegant Accommodations and Convenient Location - Unwind in air-conditioned rooms with high-end amenities, and take advantage of proximity to attractions like Poipu Beach and Moir Gardens. Immerse yourself in luxury at Ko'a Kea Resort on Po'ipu Beach for a memorable vacation experience.
importantInfo: Children 17 years old and younger stay free when occupying the parent or guardian's room, using existing bedding. Only registered guests are allowed in the guestrooms. The property has connecting/adjoining rooms, which are subject to availability and can be requested by contacting the property using the number on the booking confirmation. The property allows pets in specific rooms only and has other pet restrictions (surcharges apply and can be found in the Fees section). Guests can arrange to bring pets by contacting the property directly, using the contact information on the booking confirmation. Contactless check-out is available.

reviews.name: Deirdra
reviews.pros: The beach view was outstanding the room was comfortable we had a fantastic stay. Planning on coming back

reviews.name: Elena
reviews.pros: Fabulous staff great view

reviews.name: Patrick
reviews.headline: Almost perfect
reviews.pros: Overall, our stay at the Ko’a Kea was fabulous. The entire staff were both professional and friendly. The grounds, restaurants, pool and work out facilities were all very nice. I was a little disappointed that our “Ocean View” was only really visible from our patio. In addition, the walkway to the…

reviews.name: PHUONG
reviews.pros: Just as great as we remembered when we stayed here years ago. Valet dudes were great. Quiet and cozy boutique property. Would come back again.

reviews.name: Randall Darcy
reviews.headline: Ko'a Kea on Po'ipu Beach Was Perfect
reviews.pros: We chose the Ko'a Kea Resort due to its proximity to the Kauai Half Marathon start and finish locations. But we were soon thrilled with our choice as it was perfect. The welcome on check in and through out our stay was exceptional. The food at the hotel's Red Salt was delicious and well presented…

reviews.name: Daniel
reviews.pros: Beach front with great views. Staff was friendly.

name: Kiahuna Plantation Resort Kauai by OUTRIGGER
facilities: Internet access in public areas - surcharge
Free use of nearby fitness center
Upper floors accessible by stairs only
description: Scenic Views and Luxurious Amenities Relax on a terrace overlooking lush gardens and enjoy the convenience of concierge services. Indulge in wedding facilities, picnic spots, and barbecue grills for a memorable stay. Dining and Entertainment Options Savor delectable meals at Plantation Gardens and unwind with a drink at the on-site bar/lounge for a perfect evening. Convenient Features and Services Benefit from multilingual staff, luggage storage, and laundry facilities. Complimentary self-parking makes exploring the area a breeze. To bask in the beauty of Poipu Beach and experience unparalleled hospitality, book your stay at Kiahuna Plantation Resort Kauai by OUTRIGGER today.
importantInfo: The property is professionally cleaned. Contactless check-out is available.

policies.name: Health & Safety
policies.description: Property uses a professional cleaning service

reviews.name: Terri
reviews.pros: The location is pretty good. It is heavily car dependent so luckily we had a car. The unit was clean with a nice view and it was well appointed with everyday items.
reviews.cons: Since the units do not have air conditioning (not something that was listed in the description) you vacation with your neighbors. Especially if they have young children and don't always use their "indoor voice."

reviews.name: Lisa
reviews.pros: Location was great, beautiful grounds. Apartment was nice.
reviews.cons: Bed was a little hard and be aware if no air conditioning. When the Tradewinds are blowing, apt was comfortable but with little wind and late afternoon sunshine, could get hot. In summer I imagine temps would be worse.

reviews.name: Laura
reviews.headline: Comfortable, Stylish Unit
reviews.pros: Our unit was updated, very nice and comfortable. The air conditioning and fans cooled the space well. The bed was comfortable. We would absolutely select this unit again. My husband enjoyed using the athletic club across the street and it was great to use their showers the afternoon before a late…
reviews.cons: Fresh sugar packets and individual coffee packets would have been nice. The sugar and creamer present seemed old as they were really impacted by the humidity. The pillows were not comfortable. The price was high for the amenities.

reviews.name: Gary
reviews.headline: Great time in a great location
reviews.pros: The location is awesome and in a very nice area
reviews.cons: No AC in the room

reviews.name: Allan
reviews.headline: Fantastic time
reviews.pros: Location was very nice; the room was very nice and cozy, met all our needs
reviews.cons: Beds were a little hard

reviews.name: Adele
reviews.headline: A wonderful place to stay. Location to the beach was amazing.
reviews.pros: We had a unit super close to the beach.
reviews.cons: Pool was off site.

name: Hilton Vacation Club The Point At Poipu Kauai
description: Escape to paradise at Hilton Vacation Club The Point At Poipu Kauai, your ultimate retreat in Koloa. Recreational Oasis Dive into an array of recreational amenities including a sparkling outdoor pool, rejuvenating sauna, and fully-equipped fitness center, ensuring relaxation and wellness during your stay. Dining Delight Savor delectable dishes at the Honu Cove Bar & Grill. Wrap up your evenings with a refreshing drink at the bar/lounge, where every sunset becomes a culinary adventure. Spacious Comfort Unwind in one of our 219 contemporary air-conditioned rooms featuring kitchens with full-sized refrigerators, private balconies, and deep soaking bathtubs. Stay connected with complimentary
importantInfo: Contactless check-out is available. This property welcomes guests of all sexual orientations and gender identities (LGBTQ+ friendly).

reviews.name: Carol
reviews.headline: Great location, but this property needs some renovations and upkeep.
reviews.pros: The hotel is set in a beautiful location, and the rooms were clean. The outdoor areas including the pool, koi pond and adult spa were well taken care of.
reviews.cons: There was paint peeling from the exterior walls. Additionally, the floors seemed very thin. I could hear everything going on above me. The internet was not reliable. When I called to get a solution, it took two hours for maintenance to show up to resolve the problem. Additionally, it took a long…

reviews.name: heather
reviews.headline: My family and I have spent Easter in Kauai for the past 10 years and have always stayed at this resort. It truly is a g
reviews.pros: Beautiful resort, great staff, and very reasonable prices
reviews.cons: It was perfect! Parking was a little crowded, but other wise it was exceptional

reviews.name: Howard
reviews.headline: No complaints have stayed here many times former diamond owner
reviews.pros: Location close to beach walk to shipwreck beach close to grocery nice pool with bar and grill for breakfast and sandwiches maid service for rooms
reviews.cons: Needed to have hand sanitizers in the rooms

reviews.name: Monica
reviews.headline: Stunning views, beautiful place and great people
reviews.pros: The location was so beautiful. The property was beautiful and very comfortable with the exception of the construction going on. I absolutely loved it. Will definitely stay here again.
reviews.cons: Not applicable

reviews.name: travelingPreacha
reviews.headline: The non-resort, aging condominium complex in paradise.
reviews.pros: I recently stayed at The Point at Poipu, and while its location on Kauai’s south shore is undeniably beautiful, the overall experience fell far short of what I expect from the Hilton name. We’ve stayed at several other Hilton Vacation Club properties, and in its current condition, this one should…

reviews.name: Lynne
reviews.pros: Good location....nice pool.

To experience the ultimate blend of luxury and convenience in Koloa, book your stay at the Castle Kiahuna Plantation & Beach Bungalows.

reviews.name: Carol
reviews.pros: room was not very clean. Rust on bathroom floor which will clean up. Floors and carpets dirty .Bubble on ceiling where water had leaked from upstairs unit. NO AC , they had to bring us a few stand up fans. Three outdoor umbrellas in-unit all were broken

reviews.name: Mark
reviews.pros: Getting towels and toilet paper was difficult, no air conditioning, no staff anywhere

reviews.name: Debra
reviews.pros: To start, I’d recommend absolutely going for Ocean View. Quiet, peaceful. The beach is beautiful, the lawns and greenery are very well kept, the property is very, very nice. The condo was perfectly fine, a comfortable bed, fans kept me cool, kitchen nicely organized. Several BBQs available for…

reviews.name: george
reviews.pros: Tv in bedroom not working. Reported to maintenance not fixed. No communication regarding issue.

reviews.name: Joanne
reviews.pros: Quiet and clean very well kept up. Close to shopping and good dining without feeling like I was downtown in a major city.

reviews.name: henrysD3383XZ
reviews.headline: Great less a surprise $377 cleaning fee.
reviews.pros: The place is nice and well located. It was all great except for the surprise $377 cleaning fee that I was charged upon checkin. I booked on Agoda. Really can't find where I should have expected that fee anywhere. Otherwise a nice, clean place with friendly staff in a pretty spot.

name: Aston At Poipu Kai
facilities: Laundry washed per local authority guidelines
Guests can opt-out any cleaning services during stay
description: Luxurious Apartments with Full Kitchens Indulge in the comfort of spacious apartments at Aston at Poipu Kai, each equipped with a full kitchen, washer, and dryer. Enjoy the convenience of a private patio and modern amenities for a relaxing stay. Resort-style Amenities Experience ultimate relaxation with outdoor pools, hot tubs, and scenic walking trails. Play a round of tennis or explore nearby beaches. This 70-acre resort offers everything you need for a memorable vacation in Kauai. Convenient Location Located less than a mile from Poipu Beach Park and Shipwreck Beach, Aston at Poipu Kai is the perfect base for exploring the beauty of Kauai. With Kaihuna Golf Club just 2 miles away, and Por
importantInfo: The daily Resort Fee includes: -Shell lei greeting upon arrival -DVD movie rentals -WiFi internet access -Reserved parking -Starter kit of coffeee and laundry detergent -Local calls Front desk is open from 8:30 AM - 4:30 PM. Please be informed that all guests arriving after 4:30 pm will find instructions posted outside the office with a number to call for checkin assistance. The operator will verify the guest details and provide the security code to the safe located at the entry to the office to enable them to retrieve their key, written directions and a map to their unit. The following morning guests are required to stop at the Office to register, provide a credit card and collect pool keys and island information. Supplements are not calculated automatically in the total costs and will have to be paid for separately during your stay.

reviews.cons: No split airco

reviews.name: Laila
reviews.headline: Wonderful family friendly complex within walking distance to beach. Would definitely go back!
reviews.pros: Beautiful, peaceful, friendly staff, place was comfortable and clean.
reviews.cons: Cabinets smelled musty, sharp smell most likely due to humidity. I would suggest airing out cabinets once in a while!

reviews.name: Penny
reviews.headline: Too short
reviews.pros: Close walk to beach
reviews.cons: Not much ventilation through unit and ac unit in bedroom not very effective . Office hours ending at 4:30 was not ideal as we were not able to access the pool that night.

reviews.name: Patty
reviews.headline: Very good
reviews.pros: Location was good. The unit was spacious.
reviews.cons: Carpets were dirty. Bed wasn’t great and there were no extra blankets.

reviews.name: William
reviews.pros: Condo rental was what we were looking for. This property met our expectations. The proximity to the beach was a main reason and we enjoyed the short walk to the beach.
reviews.cons: Nothing at all.

reviews.name: Jenny
reviews.headline: Loved our 6 days 5 night stay. The staff was friendly and responsive. Super close to the beach.

reviews.name: Scott
reviews.headline: An excellent facility (minus umbrellas)
reviews.pros: The property is beautiful and located in a great spot. The staff was excellent, and the property was clean and quiet.
reviews.cons: The only negative we would have is a severe lack of umbrellas for sun protection. There are a few scattered around, but guests camp under them for the day. This was a significant drawback for our family, as most people need a break from the sun, especially in the afternoon.

reviews.name: Sara
reviews.headline: It was okay
reviews.pros: Good beach
reviews.cons: Breakfast not available

reviews.name: Mariya
reviews.headline: Loved it!
reviews.pros: The location is great, great beach nearby
reviews.cons: The AC in the room was very loud. It would be nice to have coffee in the lobby.

reviews.name: cbC7540YY
reviews.headline: Old, Stale room with no swimming access
reviews.pros: This is the worst Marriott I have ever stayed in in my life! It is old, stale, and not representative of the brand. The cabinets smell and look like something from the late 1970's. Also, can you not swim at the beach? The alleged beachfront is full of lava rocks, precluding you from swimming. As…

reviews.name: tonnesenf
reviews.headline: Caution: rooms can be worse than they appear online
reviews.pros: Updated review: Yes this Marriott is old and stale, but since they moved us to a new room we are having a good experience. The property grounds are beautiful on a gorgeous beach with a great walking path. What you should know: If you are not an owner at this resort you will most likely get a bad…

reviews.name: greggD7116HP
reviews.headline: Mid-Winter Escape
reviews.pros: The island of Kaua’i, smaller than the city of Phoenix, and with just as much traffic…but what a beautiful island it is! My wife and I stayed as guests of her sister and bro-in-law (owners) and were treated no different. This Marriott location is, by all accounts, is living away from home, but with…

name: The Lodge at Kukui’ula
description: Luxurious Spa and Golf Amenities Indulge in massages, body treatments, and facials at the onsite spa. Take a refreshing dip in one of the 5 outdoor swimming pools or 2 spa tubs after a round of golf. Gourmet Dining and Bar Options Savor local cuisine at Umeke Bar + Grill or unwind with a drink at the bar/lounge or poolside bar. Enjoy continental breakfasts at the cafe for a delightful start to your day. Elegant Rooms with Modern Comforts Relax in air-conditioned rooms with kitchen amenities, plush pillowtop beds, and private lanais. Stay entertained with Smart TVs, while luxurious bathrooms feature deep soaking bathtubs and rainfall showerheads. Book your stay at The Lodge at Kukui’ula for a
importantInfo: Pool access available from 7 AM to 8 PM. Reservations are required for golf tee times, massage services, and spa treatments. Reservations can be made by contacting the villa prior to arrival, using the contact information on the booking confirmation.

reviews.name: Timothy
reviews.pros: We loved our stay here. Staff were so polite and friendly. It was classic luxury! Thank you for giving us a very enjoyable stay

reviews.name: Michelle
reviews.pros: From start to finish our stay at the Lodge was the perfect family vacation! Nyleen was amazing as our concierge. So helpful and responsive. The Lodge was immaculate. The grounds so lush and well maintained. The restaurants served delicious food with local twists. The pool was our perfect end of the…

reviews.name: Nicholas
reviews.pros: Beautiful grounds

reviews.name: Verified traveler
reviews.pros: Our stay here was quite beautiful. We love the farm available to guests. The breakfast and dining had delicious options. The grounds are beautifully kept. The pool area was nice, not crowded at all. The Plantation room is welcoming and has a game room for both adults (ping pong and pool tables)…

reviews.name: Chris
reviews.pros: The property was georgeous and the attention to detail was incredible. All the comforts one could think of was there. There are too many to list and I suggest everyone that is semi interested in going to Kukuiula to go visit. It is heaven on earth. Aloha

name: Castle Po'ipū Shores
description: Outdoor Pool and Tennis Court Enjoy the leisure activities with our outdoor pool and tennis court. Whether it's a refreshing swim or a friendly match, our facilities cater to your relaxation and fitness needs. Complimentary Amenities Stay connected with complimentary wireless internet and make use of our picnic area and barbecue grills for a perfect outdoor gathering. Don't worry about parking as we offer free self-parking on-site for your convenience. Individually Decorated Guestrooms Experience comfort in our individually decorated guestrooms with fully equipped kitchens, private balconies, and complimentary wireless internet. Unwind in the separate sitting areas and enjoy the weekly house
importantInfo: Don't miss out on recreational opportunities including an outdoor pool and an outdoor tennis court. Additional amenities at this condo include complimentary wireless internet access, a picnic area, and barbecue grills.

reviews.pros: Great views, beaches within walking distance, well cared for pool right on the water - turtles everywhere! Bathrooms are small and cramped.

reviews.headline: Quiet place to stay in Poi’pu
reviews.pros: Great place to stay in Poipu. Quiet and well located. Our unit was faithfully furnished with comfortable beds and fully stock kitchen. Very helpful and friendly staff. We will stay here again

reviews.name: kathy
reviews.pros: Whalers cove is a amazing property, the view was stunning and my 84 year old father enjoyed the binoculars provided, he was able to see the turtles in the water from our balcony..The kitchen was stocked with everything you could possibly need. reviews.name: Jerod
reviews.pros: Friendly professional staff, well maintained property and stunning views. My family absolutely loved our stay. Thank you Whaler's Cove!

reviews.name: Daniel Alan
reviews.pros: Whalers Cove Oceanfront Resort is top notch! reviews.name: Stephanie
reviews.pros: The most beautiful property in Koloa. Very quiet except for the sound of the crashing waves. You can see dolphins, turtles and whales from your lanai. The staff is very friendly and helpful. I’ve stayed here 3 times and have called this place my home in Kauai. It’s truly magical!

reviews.name: Elizabeth
reviews.headline: Heaven on Earth

reviews.name: Thomas
reviews.headline: Great condo in a great location.
reviews.pros: Perfect location for this condo, walking distance to Poipu Beach and several restaurants in the area. Beach towels are provided at the beach hut of the condo, and there is a convenient laundry facility for the guests. The balcony is great to enjoy the sea breeze in the evenings, with an…
reviews.cons: The air conditioning equipment had not been properly cleaned prior to our arrival. A detail but worth mentioning to make the place 100% perfect.

reviews.name: Lynn
reviews.headline: Lovely property; convenient location; Ivan was a very kind host!
reviews.pros: N/A
reviews.cons: Slight musty smell in the unit

reviews.name: Megan
reviews.headline: Exceptional
reviews.pros: Large airy apartment with a peekaboo sea view. Well supplied, great location for beach, shops, restaurants etc.
reviews.cons: Between the owner and the management company, it wasn’t always clear who was responsible for what. Not a big deal but a bit frustrating to sort out.

reviews.name: Salman
reviews.headline: A perfect place for relaxation and enjoyment!
reviews.pros: Fantastic location with good amenities. Easy access to beautiful beaches and stunning sunsets.
reviews.cons: Nothing.

reviews.name: Varun
reviews.pros: Our stay at Kiahuna Paradise exceeded expectations from the moment we arrived and were greeted with superb service from the reception. The room itself is stunning and in perfect condition. The kitchen is fully stocked with appliances and kitchenware. This building was less than a five minute walk…

name: Kiahuna Paradise at Poipu beach, newly remodeled
description: Luxurious Renovated Apartment by Poipu Beach Beachfront Bliss : Enjoy a private beach area and outdoor pool Modern Amenities : Fully equipped kitchen, flat-screen TV, and free WiFi Family-Friendly Fun : Restaurant on-site, water park, and kids pool To book your stay at this newly remodeled paradise, visit our website now!

This property does not accommodate bachelor(ette) or similar parties. Managed by a private host A deposit may be required at the property.

reviews.name: Kelsie
reviews.headline: Nice experience and great hosts!
reviews.pros: It was in a great location and worth the money.
reviews.cons: The beach umbrella was broken and the fridge had rust spots on it/chipped paint.

reviews.name: Steven
reviews.headline: We loved this resort and hope to return.
reviews.pros: The condo was beautifully decorated and the grounds were breath-taking! Condo very clean and comfortable!

reviews.name: Brian
reviews.headline: Exceptional
reviews.pros: Clean and well supplied with everything you need. Air conditioning worked great.

reviews.name: Morgan
reviews.headline: Overall great stay! Love the location and use is Popui Beach/Athletic location.
reviews.pros: Great location and great hosts. Super responsive.

reviews.name: Richard
reviews.headline: Very enjoyable

reviews.name: Richard
reviews.headline: Superb

name: Kauai Shores Hotel
description: Oceanfront Location and Private Beach Kauai Shores Hotel in Kapaa offers a stunning oceanfront setting with a private beach for guests to enjoy the sun and sand. Tropical Courtyard and Outdoor Pools The 6-acre tropical courtyard at the hotel provides a lush oasis for relaxation, complemented by 2 outdoor pools for a refreshing dip. Island-Style Rooms and Oceanfront Dining Guest rooms feature vibrant island-style décor and private balconies with various scenic views. Indulge in fresh island fare and cocktails at the ocean-front Lava Lava Beach Club restaurant. Book your stay at Kauai Shores Hotel now to experience the perfect blend of tropical paradise and oceanfront luxury.
importantInfo: Extra beds are available and charges vary. Please contact the hotel in advance using the contact details on the booking confirmation. Luggage storage will be available from 07:00 - 23:00. Overnight storage is prohibited. The Lava Lava Beach Club stops serving breakfast at 11:00. The daily resort fee includes: - Bike Hire - Chilled water in lobby - Concierge services - In room coffee with 2 daily Keurig® coffee pods - 2 bottles of water en suite upon arrival - Two refillable water bottles are provided at check-in.y - In-room safe - Local and toll-free calls - Self and valet parking - WiFi Internet throughout - Outdoor yoga classes (every day) - Use of beach towels and chairsGuests are required to show a photo ID and credit card upon check-in. reviews.name: Leanne
reviews.headline: I will definitely be back.
reviews.pros: Perfectly located on the beach with great food and kind staff.
reviews.cons: Need to add fancy coffee to the menu mochas and lattes.

reviews.name: REBECCA
reviews.headline: Relaxing hotel in a great location.
reviews.pros: Good location. Very clean and the staff were friendly and helpful. Novella was amazing.
reviews.cons: The parking wasn’t the best. Crowded lot and shared with restaurant.

reviews.name: Tyler
reviews.pros: Very clean, very fun experience. Really enjoyed it.
reviews.cons: A lil expensive but other than that it was great!

reviews.name: Brandi
reviews.headline: Average
reviews.pros: Noisy and unsafe
reviews.cons: Our room door didn’t lock People were banging on our door as they walked past - it was so noisy late at night during quiet time. No point escalating to reception because by the time we did the people had moved on. The door didn’t lock and the reception didn’t seem to care or want to help us move…

reviews.name: Sam
reviews.headline: Rude inhospitable
reviews.pros: Delayed due to airline troubles, called the front desk and the lady said to call deltas 1800 number if I wanted to change reservations
reviews.cons: Rude inhospitable

reviews.name: MEI
reviews.headline: Good for vacation stay with a rental car!
reviews.pros: Internal is newer renovation and clean. Parking is easy and convenient!
reviews.cons: The building and outdoor facilities are older.

reviews.name: Simon
reviews.headline: Sheraton coconut review
reviews.pros: Room was a good size and clean and resort and eating facilities good. Well equipped fitness centre. Staff very friendly and helpful.
reviews.cons: Room outlook did have a view of the ocean but not as pictured on booking com and anticipated and the outside area just about allows room for the two chairs and table and required moving to get in or out of the doors.

reviews.name: Erdem
reviews.headline: Excellent stay and staff
reviews.pros: Great staff and modern hotel with good amenities. We loved the pool and the cabana, and balconies on each room made enjoying the ocean view easier. Clean rooms, easy parking and good activities at the hotel.
reviews.cons: The beach in front of the hotel is beautiful but not safe for swim due to undertow.

reviews.name: Joyce
reviews.headline: More good than bad
reviews.pros: Staff was super!! Facility was great. Bikes were fun. Loved being on the beach. Food was good
reviews.cons: Our “garden view” room was more a view of the storage room. Should have asked for a different room.

reviews.name: Stephen
reviews.pros: The property has a great location in Kapaa. The room was clean though a bit dated. The staff were incredibly helpful and kind. It felt a bit pricy for what it was, however, I’d stay again for a better rate
reviews.cons: Beachfront. Staff. Laid back. Clean.

reviews.name: Deanna
reviews.headline: we like the location and staff, but the room was a disappointment
reviews.pros: Location
reviews.cons: The room. Very small. No view even the partial views were mostly of the pool

reviews.name: Marie
reviews.headline: It was fair and the location is central
reviews.pros: Gorgeous View; front desk, room keeping and valet staff were nice; free bike rentals; free shave ice, games and activities; proximity to Shopping and restaurants; pools were clean and nice temps. Plenty of lounge chairs and umbrellas around pools and also chairs near ocean on the grass.
reviews.cons: Old worn, heavy shutters and sliding doors were difficult to operate, tiny bathroom; room was extremely humid- towels wouldn’t dry- I think their ventilation needs updating. no swimmable beach; hardly any service by pool.

reviews.name: Brooke
reviews.headline: We would never return to this property
reviews.pros: The staff though incredibly understaffed tried their very best to do a good job, they were all very sweet and kind. It's not right the work load that some of them had as only 1 staff member worked the desk during check in with a lobby full of waiting customers.
reviews.cons: This place is sad. We waited 1.5 hours after check in for our room. The rooms are really small and smelled like smoke. The two full sized beds as seen in the pictures are actually one full sized bed and a TERRIBLE couch hideaway bed that was like sleeping on bars because the mattress was so thin…

reviews.name: Conner
reviews.pros: Easy access to the beach and lots of restaurants within walking distance.
reviews.cons: Beds could be a bit more comfortable.

reviews.name: Bernard
reviews.headline: Great location, beautifiul landscaping but management has allowed the property to deteriorate over the years.
reviews.pros: Location and landscaping was perfect. This is the third time we have stayed there.
reviews.cons: It has become very run down over the years. Floors on the hotel room were filthy. The bathtub soap dish was missing from the wall and covered with a piece of plastic. The bottom exterior of the tub was rusting. It appeared that no maintenance or upkeep has been done for a while.

reviews.name: Shelley
reviews.pros: Everything was great except the door to our room was super hard to open
reviews.cons: Make door easier to open

reviews.name: David
reviews.headline: Good value but far from luxurious
reviews.pros: Great location
reviews.cons: Cramped quarters, tired accommodations

reviews.name: Janice
reviews.headline: Nice, but needs some maintenance.
reviews.pros: The landscape next to the ocean is beautiful.
reviews.cons: I did not have hot water until my last day there.

reviews.name: Brigida

reviews.pros: Close to beach
reviews.cons: Outdated

reviews.name: Nigel
reviews.headline: Overall Good and worked well for us.
reviews.pros: Good location spacious pools good nice park beaches. Nice breakfasts. Tiki bar was excellent. Beds were comfortable Villiage room was good. TV s excellent. Showers excellent!
reviews.cons: Really needs a refurb makeover upgrade but footprint layout very good. Some of the staff were good none were great which was disappointing.

reviews.name: Gabriella

reviews.pros: Convenient
reviews.cons: Mold smell in room. Place needs to be rebuilt.

reviews.name: Larissa

reviews.cons: The restaurant and bar were not open and didnt look to be opening anytime soon. We were expecting it so that was somewhat of a disappointment. A positive to it though was less people on site :)

reviews.pros: This property was great. Central to everything. Near a safeway and a ross and the best shaved ice/restaurants. Also has a pool and amazing view. Also if you have a prob with the room they will surely fix it.

reviews.name: Kelsey
reviews.headline: We loved our stay here! The location was perfect and the entire property was so magical. The room is a tight studio but
reviews.pros: Beautiful landscaping, thoughtful touches for our honeymoon, awesome double shower, river front with gorgeous mountain views and close to town!
reviews.cons: Having to head home!! :(

reviews.name: Lisa
reviews.headline: Very quiet with everything you need for an adventure. Amazing location!
reviews.pros: Perfect location to explore both the north and south parts of the island.
reviews.cons: There isn’t anything that we didn’t like

reviews.name: Baker
reviews.pros: The location was perfect! It was a beautiful area. There was so many great amenities such as; kayaks, knee boards, paddle boards, surf board, coolers and snorkeling gear. The price was great! There were also fruit trees on the property you could eat from.
reviews.cons: It was a little smaller than I thought it would be, but we would definitely stay here again.

reviews.name: Olivia
reviews.pros: Everything about this cute little place was cozy and comfortable. We loved it. We had a warm welcome, and a lovely stay all the way around.
reviews.cons: The cottages are closer together than they seem, but it was not a big deal at all. We still enjoyed being here and would come back

reviews.name: susanne
reviews.headline: A great home base on the East side of Kaua’i in a historic home which is beautifully furnished!
reviews.pros: The Ohana cabin is just beautiful and well equipped. It was a lovely place to stay during our week in Kaua’i and a good home base to explore the whole island.
reviews.cons: A few issues were the loud traffic also at night on occasion, and the roosters starting at 4am. We ended up sleep deprived and groggy. Many windows don’t open, they appear printed „shut“, a bit more cross ventilation would have been nice (don’t like AC and closed windows). The bathroom in the back…

reviews.name: Albert
reviews.headline: Centrally located for beach and kayaking, very clean and comfortable.
reviews.pros: We appreciated the recreational equipment available to us: Kayak, bicycles, snorkeling gear, etc. The location was great, on a canal adjacent to the river, and close to beaches. Paul, the manager was available and very helpful. It was quiet and secluded.
reviews.cons: The Inn was hard to find, with minimal signage. While centrally located, it was on a busy highway with intersections that were not entirely pedestrian friendly.

reviews.headline: Unfortunately, I’d rather sleep in my car then in the roach infested room (112) we were given
reviews.pros: The location
reviews.cons: Worst 5 nights. We did everything to avoid going home due to the roach infestation. When we told the front desk, they said it’s “normal” and “expected due to the beachfront location”. We spotted roaches everyday in every room, but mostly in the living room/kitchen. I would not stay here again and…

reviews.name: Peggy
reviews.headline: We had a wonderful stay in Kapaa that would have been great if the wind had stopped blowing!
reviews.pros: Good location on the island. Close to the ocean, very scenic. Good pool and hot tub. Close to shopping and food services.Plenty of towels. The coins for a one time laundry visit were nice. Friendly staff.
reviews.cons: A reclining couch and/or chairs would be nice. The toilet had a leak that I reported to the office. The noise disturbed our sleep for a couple of nights, but then right away the maintenance man came and fixed the problem. The noise from the roof repair was annoying -- however we were advised that…

reviews.name: Nazar
reviews.headline: Not bad
reviews.pros: Good location, beautiful ocean view, free parking, shops nearby.
reviews.cons: The biggest disappointment was the cockroaches. They are everywhere. We asked to be moved to another building, but the lady at the front desk said they were everywhere. They just sprayed our room with cockroach repellent. Usually, after such a procedure, people should not stay indoors for 24 hours…

reviews.name: DAVIS
reviews.pros: L
reviews.cons: No AC was very hot had to leave the doors open in other to get any air and at night was hot and miserable

reviews.name: Alana
reviews.headline: Relaxing, easy, and lovely!
reviews.pros: Everything was very well taken care of and the property was great. Pool is lovely, unfortunately the hot tub was closed for maintenance during our stay.
reviews.cons: It was a bit dated for the price point in my opinion.

reviews.name: Ernesto

reviews.pros: Location

reviews.headline: It was a great location to have as a home base for exploring the island.
reviews.pros: The oceanfront view was lovely from the lanai, and the resort was quiet and peaceful.
reviews.cons: Nothing that we disliked. The unit was a little “worn”, but it was very clean and comfortable.

reviews.name: Allison
reviews.headline: Nice ocean view and close to beach
reviews.pros: Convenient location next to a great beach that is safe for kids. The grounds were beautiful and well maintained and staff were very friendly.
reviews.cons: Property is a bit outdated and due to the position of the unit it was hard to get good airflow. But overall a great value.

reviews.name: Robert
reviews.headline: Location in cleanliness were exceptional. We will definitely stay again!
reviews.pros: The view was awesome! The landscape was well manicured. The central location on the island was very convenient. The lanai was exceptionally large and comfortable. The tradewinds kept the condo cool even without air conditioning.
reviews.cons: Minimal dresser space in bedroom

reviews.name: Janine
reviews.headline: A stay in paradise.
reviews.pros: The view and ocean breeze
reviews.cons: We struggle to get in. Lucky the security guard was able to help with a call to the booking center.

name: Kapaa Sands 10

Convenient Kitchen Facilities Feel at home with kitchen facilities including a microwave, fridge, and kitchenware. Cook your own meals and enjoy dining in at your own pace. Free WiFi and Parking Stay connected with free WiFi and enjoy the convenience of free private parking during your stay. Book now to experience beachside living at Kapaa Sands 10 and make unforgettable memories by the sea.

Waking up every morning with the sound of the waves, catching the sunrise in the morning, and getting the colours from the night. Getting your own little beach. The studio is also extremely cute and convenient really well…
reviews.cons: Nothing it was really perfect.

reviews.name: Keri
reviews.headline: Bliss
reviews.pros: Location & views
reviews.cons: We bought a box fan - we are from Arizona and are used to AC which this unit does not have and the roosters early morning wake ups

reviews.name: D.
reviews.headline: Wonderful beautiful magical place
reviews.pros: This place is spectacular. I was very surprised as the pictures dont do it justice. It is a small complex directly facing the water and the sound of the waves as you sleep is VERY VERY relaxing. I bought and cooked my own food for the most part and had a relaxing breakfast out on the patio. Then…
reviews.cons: Only thing I didnt like about the unit was that the blinds on the windows facing the bed didnt have black out curtains so the room was flooded with light too early for my taste.

reviews.name: Mary
reviews.headline: A beautiful location with perfect water views-very relaxing
reviews.pros: The location was perfect -right on the water with a very relaxing aspect. It was also very close to shops & restaurants.
reviews.cons: It was a studio apartment and the bathroom was quite small but functional

reviews.name: Vivi
reviews.headline: Exceptional
reviews.pros: The photos don't do the place justice - it's simply incredible! When I posted it on social media, everyone wanted to know the name of the accommodation. Excellent location, with a breathtaking sunrise. From the sand and the sea, you can reach a restaurant with breakfast facing the sea.

reviews.name: Shradha Reddy
reviews.headline: A breathtaking and memorable experience that made our special celebration feel truly elevated.
reviews.pros: The views of Hanalei Bay are unmatched, and the entire property feels like a curated sanctuary. It was the perfect setting for a special anniversary trip. The staff was incredibly attentive, and the classy, neutral decor made the room feel like a true home away from home.
reviews.cons: I was disappointed that the fresh pressed juice service ended at 11:00 AM; it would have been great to have access to those fresh, hydrating options later in the afternoon, especially on such hot days.

reviews.name: Svetlana
reviews.pros: Nice hotel with great location and stunning views, very decent breakfast with buffet

reviews.name: Jr_wellness
