reviews.name: Amy
reviews.headline: Great location and size but room
reviews.pros: Location and room size. Staff was also very friendly
reviews.cons: The air conditionings were visibly moldy so we could not use them. This caused the room to have a really musty odor. They ran out of towel pretty much every day- both room towels and pool towels. The toilet had an issue flushing and rather than sending maintenance they dropped off a plunger.

reviews.name: Crystal
reviews.pros: Pools were very good, there was a kids area in each one. Split A/C units in the bedrooms. Kitchen very well stocked with cookware. Food trucks on site were very convenient. Excellent location.
reviews.cons: Was not able to check-in on time. Was not called when room was ready either. Asked for pool towels one morning and there were apparently none available because housekeeping was washing them all. Poor cell signal in the area.

reviews.name: JuliAnnTulberg
reviews.headline: Lovely apartment stay with pools
reviews.pros: The apartment was very spacious with a lovely garden view. It was a well equipped kitchen, a comfortable bed, and a nice balcony to sit on. The facility has 2 pools which are both beautiful and the location is really great.
reviews.cons: There are roosters in the area (as with all areas of Kauai) who will wake you up at 4-6am. Also, on check-in, the staff will try to get you to sign up for a time share, which is a little odd, but no big deal.

reviews.name: Ryan
reviews.pros: The location, the amenities, the food trucks, the pool areas, the maintenance staff.
reviews.cons: We had bugs in our apartment, even after maintenance sprayed twice, we still had ants all over the kitchen

reviews.name: Jacob
reviews.headline: Strange place, but totally acceptable
reviews.pros: It's essentially a 2 bedroom 2 bath apartment in a manicured development near Hanalei. It was a decent home base for exploring the north side. I felt the price matched the overall value.
reviews.cons: It isn't a hotel, and that isn't super clear from the description online. It isn't very clear how you'd categorize this place. I guess they are technically condos, but Wyndham facilitates the private owners renting them out as short term vacation rentals and as timeshares. It was very confusing…

reviews.name: Zachariah
reviews.pros: Definitely the food trucks and the pool
reviews.cons: That it wasn’t in front to access beach easily

reviews.name: Kathryn

reviews.pros: Definitely spring for the one bedroom it has a wrap around deck and is about 4 times the size of the studio and includes a kitchen. I was lucky enough to have an ocean view it was amazing. Close to great walking trails.
reviews.cons: Windows and deck needed a little work but they are set to remodel this year. The hot tub was out of order during my stay.

reviews.name: Jeffrey

importantInfo: Tax Components Transient Accommodations Tax (TAT) – 11% This is a statewide tax applied to the gross rental proceeds from hotels, vacation rentals, and other transient accommodations. County Transient Accommodations Tax (CTAT) – 3% Each county (Hawaiʻi, Maui, Kauaʻi, and Honolulu) imposes its own additional tax on transient accommodations. In your example, Hawaiʻi County applies 3%. General Excise Tax (GET) – 4.7% Hawaiʻi’s GET is a broad tax on business activity, including hotel and rental income. The rate varies slightly by county; in Hawaiʻi County it’s 4.712%. Combined Rate Adding them together: 11%+3%+4.7%=18.712% So the total effective tax rate on accommodations in Hawaiʻi County is 18.712% of the room rate.This property does not accommodate bachelor(ette) or similar parties. A deposit may be required at the property.

reviews.cons: First, I was very happy this apartment had a grill. However, the grill blew the circuit breaker so it was necessary to run an extension cord into the house. Also, it would have been nice it the property had a hot tub!

reviews.name: Desiree
reviews.headline: We had a wonderful stay in this great condo and Dan is an excellent host
reviews.pros: Really clean and quiet
reviews.cons: All good

reviews.name: Natalie
reviews.headline: A wonderful place on earth!
reviews.pros: Everything it was just amazing thie beautiful condo!

reviews.name: Elizabeth
reviews.headline: We had a perfect vacation!
reviews.pros: The condo was so open & airy. The grounds were lush green with roaming chickens & geese. The mattresses were SO comfortable which made for a great nights sleep. There was plenty of equipment to choose from, boogey boards, surfboards, beach chairs. The location was perfect for trips to Hanalei…
reviews.cons: N/A

reviews.name: Laura
reviews.headline: Mislead by pictures
reviews.pros: The host was so great. They were well equipped for a baby
reviews.cons: Never told the second bedroom was a LOFT fully open to the main room. So who ever sleeps upstairs will be fully awakened by the person who gets up first. This is not a vacation. Booking did not let the host say it was a loft. Pool was terrible and no pictures were posted beforehand. Property fully…

reviews.name: Adriana
reviews.pros: Peaceful area and apartment was big.
reviews.cons: There was an infestation of bugs in our room. I reached out to the manager on the day of departure and they did not reply to us.

reviews.name: Andrea
reviews.headline: Outstanding, I will highly recommend it and come back soon!
reviews.pros: Breezy, amazing views, immerse in Mother Nature
reviews.cons: At night there is loud noise of bullfrogs

reviews.name: joyce
reviews.headline: It was a delightful place to stay!
reviews.pros: It was very well maintained. This is an older property and they have done a great job updating it. It has a very nice pool and Jacuzzi and the location can’t be beat. Right on the coast, just down the road from Hanalei. They have a nice shuttle that takes you into Hanalei which is really a plus…
reviews.cons: There were a few things in the property that needed fixing, but overall it was excellent. The sliding screen door onto the lanai didn’t slide easily. Just need some attention. Also, the fan in the bathroom was noisy. Those things were pretty minor because otherwise the room was beautiful and clean…

reviews.name: Rhodri
reviews.headline: Super relaxing.
reviews.pros: Great location next to Ha'ena Beach Park and turtle beach, best beaches on the island and next to the national park. Only a short ride to Princeville.
reviews.cons: Internet was not the best. Was working remotely and was sometimes cutting in and out which was at times frustrating.

reviews.name: Diane
reviews.headline: We checked out after one night because we woke up at 3:30am- 6 am with the people above us moving out.
reviews.pros: Beautifully located in Hanalei- perfect place to stay in Hanalei if you have an upper unit. Walking distance to beautiful non crowded beaches.
reviews.cons: Older property that has no noise insulation between floors- we heard every movement from people above us

reviews.name: Jillian
reviews.headline: fantastic ! highly recommend -l
reviews.pros: great location, great pool and coffee shop right there! wonderful staff. super helpful ! beautiful garden so well cared-for!
reviews.cons: the beds (all beds in the room) were way too soft- old mattresses. everything else was wonderful !

reviews.pros: Well maintained property. Loved the pool and hot tub.
reviews.cons: I did not like having to throw away food. Wished the resort had a system to donate any unused food items to the homeless on the island.

reviews.name: Mark
reviews.headline: Reasonablely priced, clean accomodations relatively close to Hanalei.
reviews.pros: Proximity to coast and Hanalei. Pool area was great from our group to gather, prepare meals and enjoy old friendships.
reviews.cons: Didn’t realize there was a difference in renters that use the resort vs outside booking.

reviews.name: Milagros
reviews.headline: Exceptional
reviews.pros: We loved the unit. Super clean and had everything we needed. The ocean view and location were excellent. Perfect for couples. My daughters enjoyed it but if you go in winter the ocean is not for kids. We loved the pool and the grill area. We will definitely be back.
reviews.cons: The wooden stair railings need sanding down because my daughters got a lot of splinters from holding on. The sea is dangerous in winter for kids. But you can go to Anini beach 30 minutes from there. We never meet the host and it was dark and hard to find the unit beacuse we got there late.

reviews.name: Desiree
reviews.headline: Loved our stay! Best part of our trip. Would absolutely love to stay here again!
reviews.pros: Location beautiful and perfect! Excellent beautiful property and views!
reviews.cons: Bedding seems a bit outdated or of lower quality.

reviews.name: Jill
reviews.headline: Beautiful Haena beach location and friendly people.
reviews.pros: The property is beautiful, located on Haena beach, north of Hanalei town. The expanse of beach is great for walks and enjoying the views!
reviews.cons: The condo could use some upgrades: sliding door to lanai is weathered and in need of repair.

reviews.name: Elizabeth
reviews.headline: Exceptional
reviews.pros: This rental was very clean, nicely decorated, and well stocked. We loved that there were beach chairs and beach towels for use also. We were very comfortable and happy there! The location is several miles beyond Hanalei, but the drive is gorgeous!
reviews.cons: The drive at night is a little harrowing. The location is a far drive from many key sites in Kauai.

reviews.name: Robert
reviews.headline: We’d return.
reviews.pros: Location and restaurant.
reviews.cons: Getting a bit old and needs maintenance. The sliding and folding doors especially.

reviews.name: Maryjo
reviews.headline: Very relaxing and comfortable stay on the north shore!
reviews.pros: Close to beach. Pool and hot tub, and laundry. Comfortable and clean.
reviews.cons: Couches not comfortable. Construction/painting going on, but understand the need for upkeep.

reviews.name: Jared
reviews.headline: Amazing Location. Unit could use some TLC. Arduous communication before check-in.
reviews.pros: Amazing location!!! Peaceful environment. Spacious unit.
reviews.cons: Too many redundant, overly verbose, and sometimes conflicting messages coming from both the resort directly and booking.com. Excessive reminders about rules and restrictions when staying here. It felt like they thought I was just released from prison, had a hard time reading, and was planning to…

reviews.name: Toni
reviews.headline: Very good
reviews.pros: Room was lovely, very breezy if you leave all doors and windows open and the tradewinds are blowing. Hanalei Day Spa is on site, and hubby had a great massage. Pool and grill area are beautiful. Very quiet, calm and peaceful. No chickens crowing!
reviews.cons: There were no dish towels or oven mitts in the kitchen. The ceiling fans need to be replaced, the current ones do not give off enough airflow. Provided was one pump bottle of hand soap in the kitchen and no soap in either bathroom. Make sure you bring your toiletries.

reviews.name: John
reviews.headline: With 2015 era telecommunications, the stay would have been close to ideal.
reviews.pros: Location Lots and lots of bath towels Ease of coming and going Kitchen stocked with utensils and appliances
reviews.cons: The spotty wifi was terrible - added to no working TV - this was a major downgrade Being part of the resort but not being able to use several resort services was silly. “Please take out the trash daily” but only 2 trash bags for a 6 night stay?

reviews.name: Goran
reviews.headline: I’d definitely choose to return to this resort.
reviews.pros: The resort is well-located, surrounded by beautiful scenery and offering a peaceful, pleasant atmosphere.
reviews.cons: The beach directly in front of the resort features a rocky shoreline, making it less ideal for swimming. However, a designated swimming beach is just a short 10-minute drive away, offering a more suitable and enjoyable spot for water activities.

reviews.name: Melody
reviews.headline: Remote location with a wonderful view, great for Kauai
reviews.pros: Quiet location, beautiful view. Helpful property management staff. Sea view. Beautiful balcony. Spacious apartment.
reviews.cons: The mattress could be upgraded and we heard some noise from the parking lot when we went to sleep since bedroom faces parking lot.

reviews.name: Rainer
reviews.headline: Nice place in a super location, but requires a bit of work.
reviews.pros: Great location & views.
reviews.cons: Not a true two bedroom. The two bedrooms were simply partitioned from the living room and kitchen by a wooden partition that did not even go all the way to the ceiling. Toilet did not flush well and had a leak (which someone came to fix). Towel bar was gone. Screen door to patio did not close…

reviews.name: Katarina
reviews.headline: Probably the most beautiful place on Earth
reviews.pros: Hanalei Colony Resort is the most wonderful place. Situated on the north shore of Kauai it is just a walking distance away from the Nepali coast which is just one of the most beautiful places in the world. This is where we were heading for a hike so I warmly recommend this resort for anyone who…
reviews.cons: If I really try to find some drawbacks it might be the unpredictable weather in particular during rain season, as most people have to reserve their travel and stay weeks or months before a short-range weather forecast is available. So once you are there you have to adapt your plans due to the…

reviews.name: David
reviews.headline: Superb

After full payment is taken, the property's details, including the address and where to pick up the keys, will be sent to you by email. A deposit may be required at the property.

reviews.name: Steve
reviews.pros: No breakfast. Location fantastic. Everything was ideal except for the bed.
reviews.cons: The bed caused back pain.

reviews.name: Lynda
reviews.headline: The resort was lovely and well maintained, but we won't return.
reviews.pros: The unit was very well cleaned. The view was lovely with easy access to the beach. The pool and sauna were very nice and the area well maintained.
reviews.cons: Though well cleaned, the unit had a very strong mold odor, clearly inside the walls. Also, I did text the host about it and they discounted my concerns.
